domestic-burglar-alarm.intro: Protect your home with a domestic burglar alarm designed around how you actually live. Icomply survey rooms, entry points and vulnerable glazing, then specify wired or wireless kits that suit Victorian terraces, new builds and larger family houses across Greater Manchester and the North West. We install, commission and hand over simple arming routines so the system is used every day — not left switched off.
domestic-burglar-alarm.body: From Stockport we fit domestic burglar alarms for owner-occupiers, landlords and housing providers who want dependable detection without clutter. Options include door and window contacts, PIRs, shock sensors, app notifications and optional monitoring. Work is carried out to PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 principles with clear grading advice where insurers ask for it. You receive a fixed-price quote after survey, tidy cable routes or discreet wireless devices, full walk-test and user guidance. Planned maintenance and battery changes keep the system reliable year after year.
domestic-burglar-alarm.meta_desc: Domestic burglar alarm install & service across Greater Manchester & the North West. Icomply — PD 6662, fixed quotes, Stockport engineers.
focus_points: Home survey covering doors, windows, rooms and outbuildings
Wired or wireless domestic kits with simple day-to-day use
PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 guidance and commissioning paperwork
App alerts, optional monitoring and ongoing maintenance
faq: Is a domestic burglar alarm worth it for a typical house?
Yes — a well-placed system deters opportunistic break-ins and gives early warning. We match grade and device layout to risk, lifestyle and any insurer conditions rather than overselling equipment.
Will installation damage décor?
We route cables carefully, use trunking only where agreed, or fit wireless devices where chasing is impractical. Finish work is discussed before we start so rooms stay presentable.
Can I control the alarm from my phone?
Most modern domestic systems we install support smartphone apps for arm, disarm and alerts. We set permissions for family members and show you how to use them at handover.
domestic-burglar-alarm.seo_keywords: domestic burglar alarm, home burglar alarm installation, house alarm North West, domestic alarm Manchester, home security alarm Stockport, wireless home alarm, PD 6662 domestic, Icomply burglar alarm

grade-3-intruder-alarm.intro: Grade 3 intruder alarms are specified where risk is higher — commercial stock, cash handling, vulnerable assets or insurer-mandated protection. Icomply design and install Grade 3 systems to PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 across the North West, with tamper paths, suitable detectors and signalling that match the grade. Our Stockport engineers survey, document and commission so auditors and underwriters can see a clear specification trail.
grade-3-intruder-alarm.body: We assess attack paths, occupancy patterns and existing security before recommending Grade 3 equipment. That may include dual-tech detectors, magnetic contacts on high-value openings, shock sensing on vulnerable façades and robust power and path monitoring. Handover includes zone schedules, user levels and grade-relevant certificates. Whether you are upgrading from Grade 2 or building a new site, we deliver a fixed-price scope after survey and can align monitoring for police or ARC response where criteria are met.
grade-3-intruder-alarm.meta_desc: Grade 3 intruder alarm design, install & commission. PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 across Manchester, Stockport & the North West. Fixed quotes.
focus_points: Risk-led Grade 3 design for commercial and high-value sites
PD 6662 / BS EN 50131-compliant devices and signalling
Commissioning certificates and grade documentation
Upgrade paths from existing Grade 2 installations
faq: When is Grade 3 required?

Often for commercial premises, higher-value stock, certain insurer policies or where risk assessment justifies stronger detection and tamper protection. We confirm grade with you and your broker before final design.
Can you upgrade my Grade 2 system to Grade 3?
Frequently yes — by replacing or adding devices, improving signalling and documenting the new grade. A survey confirms what can be retained to control cost.
Does Grade 3 guarantee police response?
Police response depends on URN, ARC arrangements and force policy, not grade alone. We design Grade 3 systems that support the signalling and confirmation routes needed for response where available.
grade-3-intruder-alarm.seo_keywords: Grade 3 intruder alarm, Grade 3 alarm installation, BS EN 50131 Grade 3, PD 6662 Grade 3, commercial Grade 3 alarm North West, Grade 3 alarm Manchester, Stockport Grade 3 security

pd-6662-alarm-system.intro: PD 6662 is the UK application of European intruder and hold-up alarm standards — the framework insurers and professional installers expect. Icomply design, install and maintain PD 6662 alarm systems for homes, shops, offices and multi-site estates across Greater Manchester and the wider North West. From Stockport we specify grade, detectors and signalling so your system is defensible at audit and practical day to day.
pd-6662-alarm-system.body: A PD 6662-aligned project starts with a survey: premises type, risk, cable routes, power and monitoring needs. We then select graded equipment, programme zones and confirmation logic, and commission with walk-tests and user training. Documentation covers system grade, device schedules and handover notes. Existing non-compliant installs can often be brought closer to PD 6662 through targeted upgrades rather than full rip-out. Maintenance contracts keep batteries, sensors and signalling healthy between visits.
pd-6662-alarm-system.meta_desc: PD 6662 alarm system design, install & maintenance. Greater Manchester & North West. Icomply — graded systems, fixed quotes, Stockport base.
focus_points: PD 6662-aligned design from first survey to handover
Correct grade selection for domestic and commercial risk
Commissioning certificates and system schedules
Maintenance and upgrade of existing alarm estates
faq: What does PD 6662 mean for my site?
It sets how European alarm standards are applied in the UK, including grading and installation practice. Following it helps with insurer confidence and professional monitoring options.
Is every alarm sold as PD 6662 compliant?
No. DIY and ungraded kits may not meet the standard. We specify and install equipment and methods intended to satisfy PD 6662 requirements for your agreed grade.
Do you certificate PD 6662 work?
Yes. Where the job includes commissioning, we issue commissioning certificates and grade documentation as part of the agreed scope.
pd-6662-alarm-system.seo_keywords: PD 6662 alarm system, PD 6662 installation, PD6662 intruder alarm, BS EN 50131 UK, PD 6662 North West, PD 6662 Manchester, graded alarm install Stockport

texecom-alarm-installation.intro: Texecom is a trusted British brand for wired and hybrid intruder systems used in homes and commercial sites. Icomply install and commission Texecom alarm systems across the North West — from Premier Elite-style panels to modern app-connected setups. Our engineers programme zones, set user codes correctly and leave you with a system that is quiet when it should be and loud when it matters.
texecom-alarm-installation.body: We survey entry points and room layouts, then recommend Texecom panels, expanders, PIRs, contacts and sounders that match the risk and budget. Hybrid installs keep reliable hardwired cores while adding wireless devices where chasing is difficult. Smartphone apps, key fobs and optional monitoring are configured at commissioning. Stockport-based teams cover Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire and Merseyside for new installs, panel replacements and service call-outs on existing Texecom estates.

faq: Do you only fit Texecom, or can you service mine too?
Both. We install new Texecom systems and maintain or expand existing ones after we confirm panel type and condition on survey.
Can Texecom systems be monitored?
Yes. We can configure signalling to an ARC for monitored response where your risk and budget require it, subject to correct grade and confirmation design.
How long does a typical house install take?
Many domestic Texecom installs complete in a day once the design is agreed; larger commercial sites take longer. We confirm programme after survey.

ajax-alarm-installation.intro: Ajax wireless alarms combine fast installation with polished apps and reliable radio mesh performance. Icomply are experienced Ajax installers for homes, shops and offices across Greater Manchester and the North West. We design device placement for coverage and aesthetics, pair hubs correctly and set scenarios so arming modes match opening hours or family routines.
ajax-alarm-installation.body: Ajax suits refurbishments, listed buildings and sites where cabling is disruptive. We specify hubs, motion detectors, door contacts, glass-break or shock devices, indoor and outdoor sirens and smart home integrations as needed. Commissioning includes radio range checks, user roles and notification preferences. From our Stockport base we also handle add-on devices, battery swaps and multi-site Ajax roll-outs for landlords and FM teams who want one app estate view.

faq: Is Ajax secure enough for business use?
Ajax is widely used on commercial sites when devices and monitoring are specified correctly. We advise on grade expectations, tamper and power considerations during survey.
Will Ajax work through thick walls?
Range is excellent in most UK buildings; we check signal strength on survey and add range extenders or reposition devices if needed.
Can I expand the system later?
Yes. Extra detectors, cameras and automation devices can usually be added to the same hub. We plan capacity at design stage so growth is straightforward.

alarm-system-upgrade.intro: Outdated panels, false-alarm-prone detectors and systems that cannot notify you on a phone are common reasons to upgrade. Icomply plan alarm system upgrades that reuse sound cabling where possible, replace tired devices and introduce modern control without a full rebuild. Across the North West we work with homes, retail units and commercial estates to improve reliability and insurer acceptance.
alarm-system-upgrade.body: Upgrade projects start with a health check: panel age, battery condition, zone faults, signalling and user complaints. We then propose a phased or complete upgrade — new panel, hybrid expanders, better PIRs, shock sensors or app modules — with a fixed price after survey. You keep working while we minimise downtime, and we retrain staff or household users at the end. Documentation and grade notes are updated so the upgraded system is easy to maintain.
alarm-system-upgrade.meta_desc: Alarm system upgrade across Greater Manchester & the North West. Modern panels, fewer false alarms, app control. Icomply fixed quotes.
focus_points: Survey of existing zones, cabling and fault history
Panel, detector and signalling upgrades with minimal disruption
Reuse of viable wiring to control cost
Fresh commissioning, user training and maintenance plan
faq: Do I need a full rewire to upgrade?
Often no. Many upgrades reuse existing cables and only replace the panel and selected devices. Wireless hybrid modules fill gaps where cables fail.
Will an upgrade stop false alarms?
Better detector technology and correct siting reduce false alarms significantly. We also review pets, HVAC drafts and open-plan layouts that trigger older PIRs.
Can you upgrade while the building stays open?
Yes. We stage work outside peak hours where needed and keep critical areas protected during the changeover wherever practical.
alarm-system-upgrade.seo_keywords: alarm system upgrade, upgrade burglar alarm, replace old alarm panel, intruder alarm upgrade North West, alarm modernisation Manchester, hybrid alarm upgrade Stockport

monitored-intruder-alarm.intro: A monitored intruder alarm does more than sound a siren — events are handled by an Alarm Receiving Centre so keyholders or emergency services can be contacted according to your contract. Icomply design and install monitored systems for commercial and domestic clients across Greater Manchester and the North West, aligning grade, confirmation and signalling with realistic response options.
monitored-intruder-alarm.body: We specify path diversity where required (for example dual-path signalling), set confirmation logic to reduce false police calls, and programme user and engineer codes properly. Monitoring can sit alongside app alerts so you know what is happening in real time. From Stockport we commission new monitored installs and convert suitable existing systems. Contracts, ARC onboarding and keyholder lists are walked through clearly so nobody is surprised at 2 a.m.
monitored-intruder-alarm.meta_desc: Monitored intruder alarm install & setup. ARC signalling, confirmation design & PD 6662 practice. Manchester, Stockport & North West.
focus_points: ARC-ready design with appropriate grade and confirmation
Dual-path and modern signalling options where risk demands
Keyholder, user and notification setup at commissioning
Conversion of existing systems to monitored operation
faq: What is the difference between app alerts and full monitoring?
App alerts notify you or staff. Full monitoring means an ARC processes alarms to agreed procedures — contacting keyholders and, where eligible, police.
Is monitoring expensive?
There is usually an equipment and installation cost plus a monthly ARC fee. We explain options so you only pay for the response level you need.
Can flats and houses be monitored too?
Yes. Domestic monitoring is available; commercial sites more often need it for insurance. We match the package to property type and risk.
monitored-intruder-alarm.seo_keywords: monitored intruder alarm, monitored burglar alarm, ARC alarm monitoring, dual path alarm, monitored alarm North West, monitored alarm Manchester, Stockport monitored security

police-response-alarm.intro: Police response alarms must meet force and industry rules around Unique Reference Numbers (URNs), confirmed activations and professional monitoring. Icomply help North West businesses and high-risk sites design systems that support police response pathways — correct grade, confirmed alarms and ARC signalling — rather than relying on an unconfirmed bell-only system that will not attract attendance.
police-response-alarm.body: We survey risk, specify PD 6662-aligned equipment, and configure confirmation (for example sequential detection) so false call-outs are minimised. ARC partnership and URN application processes are explained step by step; response policies vary by force and change over time, so we design for current best practice and document the system thoroughly. Stockport engineers install, commission and maintain police-response-capable systems across Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire and Merseyside.
police-response-alarm.meta_desc: Police response alarm design & install. URN-ready, confirmed alarms & ARC monitoring across Greater Manchester & the North West.
focus_points: Design for confirmed activations and reduced false calls
PD 6662 grading and professional monitoring pathways
Support with ARC setup and URN-related documentation
Ongoing maintenance so response eligibility is not lost to neglect
faq: Does buying an alarm automatically get police response?
No. Response normally requires a monitored system meeting confirmation rules and a valid URN through an approved route. We design systems that support that process.
What is alarm confirmation?
Confirmation means more than one independent signal of an intrusion before police are requested, cutting false alarms. We programme detectors and zones to achieve this sensibly.
Can residential properties get police response?
It is less common than for commercial sites and depends on force policy and monitoring arrangements. We advise honestly after assessing your risk and location.
police-response-alarm.seo_keywords: police response alarm, URN alarm system, confirmed alarm installation, police response intruder alarm North West, ARC police response Manchester, PD 6662 police response

pir-sensor-installation.intro: Passive infrared (PIR) sensors are the workhorses of room protection — detecting body heat movement while you are away. Icomply install, replace and re-site PIR sensors on domestic and commercial intruder systems across the North West. Correct height, angle and pet-immune choices matter more than brand stickers; we get the placement right first time.
pir-sensor-installation.body: We fit PIRs to new systems and as upgrades on existing panels from major manufacturers. Dual-tech sensors combine PIR with microwave for tougher commercial environments, while curtain and volumetric patterns suit corridors, offices and open-plan homes. Installation includes neat mounting, correct zone programming, walk-testing and advice on furniture, heaters and blinds that cause false alarms. From Stockport we also attend reactive call-outs for failed or flashing PIRs.
pir-sensor-installation.meta_desc: PIR sensor installation & replacement. Pet-immune, dual-tech & corridor PIRs across Manchester, Stockport & the North West.
focus_points: Correct siting to cut false alarms and dead spots
Pet-immune and dual-tech options for homes and businesses
Compatible replacements for common panel brands
Walk-test and zone programming included
faq: Why does my PIR keep false alarming?
Common causes include heaters, direct sun, hanging objects, pests and incorrect sensitivity. We diagnose and re-site or replace the sensor rather than only silencing the panel.
Can PIRs work with pets?
Pet-immune models help with cats and small dogs when mounted and set correctly. Large dogs and free-roaming pets may still need careful design or alternative detection.
Do you install outdoor PIRs?
Yes, where suitable outdoor detectors are part of the design. Outdoor units need weather-rated devices and careful aiming to avoid neighbour movement and foliage.
pir-sensor-installation.seo_keywords: PIR sensor installation, PIR detector fit, replace PIR alarm, pet immune PIR, dual tech PIR North West, PIR installation Manchester, alarm motion sensor Stockport

door-contact-alarm-installation.intro: Door contact alarm sensors protect the first point of entry — front doors, fire exits, stockroom doors and roller shutters with suitable contacts. Icomply install magnetic door contacts and related perimeter devices on new and existing intruder systems throughout Greater Manchester and the North West, wiring or pairing them cleanly so openings report reliably to the panel.
door-contact-alarm-installation.body: We select surface or flush contacts for timber, uPVC and metal doors, and specify industrial contacts for shutters and warehouse doors. Installation covers alignment, cable protection, zone assignment (exit route vs 24-hour where required) and testing under real open/close cycles. Combined with PIRs and shock sensors, contacts form a layered design that catches both stealthy and smash entries. Stockport engineers also replace failed reeds and damaged cables on service visits.
door-contact-alarm-installation.meta_desc: Door contact alarm installation for homes & businesses. Magnetic contacts, shutters & exit doors — North West fixed quotes.
focus_points: Surface, flush and heavy-duty contacts matched to door type
Correct zone programming for entry routes and final exit
Shutter and commercial door protection options
Repair and replacement of failed existing contacts
faq: Are wireless door contacts reliable?
Quality wireless contacts on well-designed systems are very reliable. We check signal strength and battery status at install and on maintenance visits.
Can you protect a uPVC door without drilling messily?
Often yes — surface contacts or carefully placed wireless contacts minimise damage. We agree the method with you before work starts.
Should every internal door have a contact?
Not always. We prioritise perimeter doors and high-risk rooms. Internal contacts are added where layout or insurance needs require them.
door-contact-alarm-installation.seo_keywords: door contact alarm installation, magnetic door contact, alarm door sensor, shutter contact alarm, door contact fitters North West, door sensor Manchester

shock-sensor-installation.intro: Shock sensors detect attack on glass, frames and fragile panels before an intruder is fully inside — ideal for shop fronts, patio doors and vulnerable windows. Icomply install and calibrate shock sensors on intruder systems across the North West, balancing sensitivity so genuine attacks trigger while traffic vibration does not.
shock-sensor-installation.body: We survey glazing types, frame materials and ambient vibration (roads, plant, heavy doors) before choosing analyser modules or detector models. Installation includes firm mounting, cable management or wireless pairing, threshold setup and supervised testing with controlled knocks. Shock devices work best as part of a layered design with contacts and PIRs. From Stockport we retrofit shock protection onto existing panels when insurers or risk assessments request better perimeter defence.
shock-sensor-installation.meta_desc: Shock sensor installation for windows, shop fronts & frames. Calibrated protection across Manchester, Stockport & the North West.
focus_points: Shock detection for glass and frames before full entry
Sensitivity calibration to cut traffic-related false alarms
Retrofit onto many existing graded systems
Layered design with contacts and room PIRs
faq: Will shock sensors false alarm on a busy road?
Correct specification and calibration keep false alarms low. We test on site and adjust thresholds; extreme sites may need alternative or dual methods.
Are they suitable for double glazing?
Yes when mounted on the frame as the manufacturer intends. We do not glue random sensors to glass without a proper design.
Can shock sensors work wirelessly?
Many modern ranges offer wireless shock devices. We confirm compatibility with your panel or hub during survey.
shock-sensor-installation.seo_keywords: shock sensor installation, window shock sensor alarm, glass break shock detector, shop front alarm sensor, shock sensor North West, perimeter alarm Manchester

alarm-keypad-installation.body: We fit wired and wireless keypads, proximity readers and touchscreen controllers compatible with major brands. Work includes cable runs or pairing, address programming, backlight and tone settings, engineer/user code structure and a short training session. Yes. Multi-keypad systems are common on larger homes and commercial sites. We check panel capacity before quoting.
What if I keep forgetting codes?
Proximity tags or app arming can reduce code use. We configure options that suit your household or team.
Do you replace keypads for older panels?
Often we can supply compatible replacements. If the panel is obsolete, we quote a sensible upgrade path rather than forcing unavailable parts.

How long is the building unprotected?
We plan cutover to minimise downtime and can stage work. Temporary measures are discussed for higher-risk commercial sites.
Can the new panel use my old monitoring contract?

faq: Is a smart alarm as secure as a traditional wired system?

What happens if my broadband fails?

faq: How long does monitoring setup take?
Hardware and programming may complete in a visit; ARC account activation timing depends on paperwork and provider. We outline the timeline up front.
Can you set up monitoring on my existing alarm?
Often yes if the panel can support a communicator and the grade/confirmation design is suitable. A survey confirms feasibility.
What is dual-path signalling?
Two independent routes (for example IP plus radio) so a single network outage is less likely to blind the ARC. We recommend it for higher-risk commercial sites.

faq: Why do pear leads fail so often?

Can carers replace leads themselves?

Do you need the brand name before visiting?
It helps us bring the correct jacks. A photo of the lead plug and call point is often enough if the brand label is unclear.

nurse-call-point-installation.intro: Nurse call points at the bed, ensuite and staff reset locations define how quickly help is summoned. Icomply install nurse call points in new rooms, refurbished wings and gap-fill locations across North West care and healthcare sites, wiring or configuring them into the existing panel with full functional tests.
nurse-call-point-installation.body: Installation includes back-box and containment coordination where needed, correct height and accessibility, labelling, and verification of call, emergency and reset paths. We work quietly in occupied homes and protect décor. Additional points often solve coverage gaps after layout changes or en-suite conversions. From Stockport we also replace cracked or contaminated faceplates that fail infection-control or reliability expectations.
nurse-call-point-installation.meta_desc: Nurse call point installation for beds, ensuites & corridors. Care home fit-outs across Greater Manchester & the North West.
focus_points: New call points for rooms, ensuites and communal areas
Accessible heights and clear labelling
Integration with existing nurse call panels
Replacement of damaged or non-compliant faceplates
faq: Can you add points without replacing the whole system?
Usually yes if the panel has spare capacity and cabling routes exist or wireless extensions are suitable.
Do you install disabled toilet alarms as part of nurse call?
Disabled toilet / WC alarms are closely related emergency call devices. We install them as standalone or integrated solutions depending on the site design.
How disruptive is point installation in an occupied room?
Most single-point jobs are short. We agree access with carers so residents are comfortable and dignity is maintained.

disabled-toilet-alarm-installation.intro: Disabled toilet alarms (WC emergency alarms) let users call for help when they cannot reach a phone or door — a legal and dignity essential in public and commercial buildings. Icomply install disabled toilet alarm systems across Greater Manchester and the North West, with pull cords, reset points, sounders and remote indication sited to BS 8300-minded good practice.
disabled-toilet-alarm-installation.body: We fit complete kits for new WCs and refurbishments: ceiling pull cord with two bangles, reset button, overdoor or remote lamp/sounder and, where required, links into nurse call or BMS indication. Installation includes accessible cord lengths, clear signage advice and full functional testing. Stockport engineers also repair broken cords and failed sounders on existing kits in offices, retail, education and care premises. Multi-toilet sites can be standardised for easier maintenance.
disabled-toilet-alarm-installation.meta_desc: Disabled toilet alarm installation for commercial & care sites. Pull cords, resets & indicators — Manchester, Stockport & North West.
focus_points: Full WC emergency alarm kits for new and refurbished toilets
Correct cord, reset and indicator positioning
Optional integration with nurse call or remote indication
Repairs and multi-toilet standardisation
faq: Is a disabled toilet alarm a legal requirement?

Accessible WC provision and emergency assistance alarms are expected under accessibility good practice and building regulations context for many premises. We install to recognised layouts; your building control or access consultant confirms project obligations.
Can the alarm report to reception?
Yes — remote lamps/sounders or integration into a nurse call or monitoring point are common. We design the indication path with you.
How quickly can a broken pull cord be fixed?
Reactive repairs are usually straightforward. Same-week attendance is typical where capacity allows; life-safety faults are prioritised.
disabled-toilet-alarm-installation.seo_keywords: disabled toilet alarm installation, WC emergency alarm, accessible toilet pull cord, disabled WC alarm North West, toilet alarm install Manchester, BS 8300 toilet alarm

emergency-pull-cord-installation.intro: Emergency pull cords give a simple, reachable way to call for assistance in bathrooms, bedrooms and specialist care spaces. Icomply install and replace emergency pull cords and associated call modules across care homes, healthcare and accessible facilities in the North West, ensuring cords hang at usable heights with reliable switching.
emergency-pull-cord-installation.body: We fit ceiling or wall-mounted cord sets, double bangles where required, and test mechanical and electrical operation into the host nurse call or WC alarm. Frayed cords, missing bangles and stiff mechanisms are common reactive jobs we clear quickly. New installs form part of room refurbishments or HTM-aware upgrades. From Stockport our engineers work respectfully in resident spaces and leave test confirmation with the nurse in charge or manager.
emergency-pull-cord-installation.meta_desc: Emergency pull cord installation & replacement for care and accessible WCs. Reliable call paths across the North West. Icomply.
focus_points: Ceiling and wall emergency pull cord sets fitted correctly
Double-bangle arrangements for reachable assistance
Integration testing into nurse call or WC alarms
Fast replacement of frayed or missing cords
faq: How long should a pull cord be?

Cords should be usable from the floor and from seated positions — typically with a lower bangle reachable by someone who has fallen. We set lengths to recognised accessible design practice for the room.
Can one cord serve a whole ensuite?
Layout matters. Sometimes a single well-placed cord is enough; larger or complex bathrooms may need additional call devices. We advise on survey.
Do you only fit cords on nurse call systems?
We fit cords on nurse call and standalone disabled toilet alarms. Tell us which system you have and we will match the parts.
